Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: carefully reading the users pseudo BPMN representation Its a detailed flowchart of a multinational smartphone supply chain covering everything from market research to final distribution

Text: The user mentioned aspects like rationale improvements risk management decision making stakeholder communication and performance measurement So I should ensure the questions touch on all these themes

Text: Looking at the start market research and RD are the initial steps

Text: Then the parallel gateway for securing components from different countries this is a critical part

Name: Abductive Reasoning - PE

Text: For example instead of just asking What if components are delayed I can phrase it as exploring mitigation strategies

Name: Validation - IND
